issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit step-by-step instructions for the agent, making it ambiguous how to use the skill.
The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for guidance usage.
The skill file is specific to Python and the Guidance library, limiting portability to other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Extract structured product review as guaranteed-valid JSON
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a generic JSON-mode prompt with manual Pydantic parse, missing Guidance's gen_json(schema=...) constrained generation and named lm["review"] capture that guarantee schema-valid output.

scenarios.name: Classify review sentiment with a confidence score matching a regex
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relied on prompt instructions and post-hoc parsing, while treatment used select([...], name="sentiment") and gen(regex=..., name="confidence") so outputs are constrained at the token level and readable via lm["..."] captures.
